_comment: Kid voice PERSONAS (Fish Audio refs) + look->persona map for task #72. Lines are generated PER PERSONA (kid_lines.json), not per look — many looks share a persona. RACIAL-CONSISTENCY AUDIT: the Fish catalog only carries race-distinct CHILD voices for South-Asian (Indian-accent girl) and Latina girl; there are NO African-American / East-Asian child voices, so Black/Asian looks use general American kid voices (same honest outcome as the adult audit, bounded by the catalog). Personas are chosen by sex + timbre; race matched where a fitting child voice exists.

KID_BOY_BRIGHT.title: Child voice boy
KID_BOY_BRIGHT.why: cheerful energetic innocent young boy - general/white/asian boys

KID_BOY_HYPER.title: child voice
KID_BOY_HYPER.why: high-pitched loud energetic young boy - older sporty boys

KID_BOY_SOFT.title: Child
KID_BOY_SOFT.why: soft reflective inquisitive little boy - youngest (age ~5)

KID_GIRL_BRIGHT.title: Child
KID_GIRL_BRIGHT.why: bright energetic cheerful playful young girl - general/white girls

KID_GIRL_SWEET.title: Child
KID_GIRL_SWEET.why: soft gentle sweet innocent young girl - younger girls

KID_GIRL_LATINA.title: latina girl voice
KID_GIRL_LATINA.why: energetic expressive young Latina - Latina girl looks (race match)

KID_GIRL_INDIAN.title: little boy (Indian girl child)
KID_GIRL_INDIAN.why: young female child's voice with an Indian accent - South-Asian girl looks (race match)

parents._comment: Generic parent-to-kid lines reuse EXISTING adult NPC voices (npc_voices.json). Rendered into the pack under these keys so audio is self-contained; #72 may instead call playNpcVoice on the actual parent NPC.

lookMap._comment: kid look (KID_CHARS n + KID_VARIANTS n) -> persona. Sex-consistent; race-matched for Latina/South-Asian where a voice exists.
